applicability_notes: Golden maps directly to torch.argmax; when dim is None torch reduces over all dims (keepdim requires explicit all-dims tuple). ttnn.argmax requires ROW_MAJOR layout input — call sites consistently insert ttnn.to_layout(..., ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT) or ttnn.untilize / ttnn.untilize_with_unpadding immediately before. Common chain it terminates: [untilize -> argmax] on final-token logits in LLM decode loops, often with keepdim=True and dim=3 (or dim=-1) over the vocab axis, frequently writing into a preallocated output_tensor for trace capture.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, batch_or_1, vocab] decode logits, vocab-sized last dim
placement_observations.source: tt_out_gathered = all_gather(..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); tt_out_rm = ttnn.untilize(tt_out_gathered, use_multicore=True, sub_core_grids=...); tt_out_tok = ttnn.argmax(tt_out_rm, dim=3, keepdim=True, use_multicore=True, output_tensor=tt_out_tok, sub_core_grids=sub_core_grids)

logits_tt = ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); logits_rm = ttnn.untilize_with_unpadding(logits_tt, output_tensor_end=[0,0,0,vocab-1], use_multicore=True); out_tok_tt = ttnn.argmax(logits_rm, dim=-1, keepdim=False, use_multicore=True)

placement_observations.tensor_role: input (working tensor in iterative top-k loop)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: [batch, N] 2D work tensor, argmax over last dim per iteration
placement_observations.source: use_row_major = work.dtype == ttnn.float32; if use_row_major and work.layout != ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT: work = ttnn.to_layout(work, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT); idx = ttnn.argmax(work, dim=-1)

"For ttnn.argmax, the output is a small [...,1] uint32 tensor"; ttnn.argmax(logits_rm, dim=-1, keepdim=False, use_multicore=True, output_tensor=out_tok_tt) writing into preallocated output for D2H single-token read; also ttnn.copy(argmax_result, self.token_id_device[trace_key]) feedback-buffer pattern
